on_screen_text:
2000-3000 rupaye kharch karke bhi 'English nahi seekh paayi' kehkar roti hui main [Me crying after spending 2000-3000 rupees and still saying 'I couldn't learn English']
Mysivi app par sirf ’3 mein English seekhne ke baad. [After learning English on Mysivi app for just ’3.]
summary: A split-screen meme ad contrasting the regret of wasting money on expensive English courses with the confidence gained from learning English on the Mysivi app for just ’3.
